title: Magnificently Crispy Chinese Vegetable Spring Rolls
description: A delicious and crispy Chinese dish featuring fresh thyme and a mother-sauce-base, perfect for a crowd, this recipe is a low-fat friendly option that is sure to please. The combination of vegetables and thyme creates a floral and savory flavor profile.

ingredients.name: spring roll wrappers
ingredients.notes: usually found in the frozen food section

instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Combine the chopped thyme, shredded cabbage, and grated carrots in a large bowl.
Add the mother sauce, salt, and pepper to the bowl and mix well.
Lay a spring roll wrapper on a flat surface and place about 1 tablespoon of the vegetable mixture in the center of the wrapper.
Brush the edges of the wrapper with a small amount of water and fold the bottom half up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll up the wrapper to form a tight cylinder.
Repeat the process with the remaining wrappers and filling.
Carefully place the spring rolls in the hot oil and fry until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes on each side.
Remove the spring rolls from the oil with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
Serve the spring rolls hot and enjoy.
